title: Prevent Hardcoded URIs
description: Hardcoding a URI can lead to multiple issues, primarily affecting the portability and security of your program. This rule identifies instances where URIs or path delimiters are hardcoded.
recommendation: Replace hardcoded URIs with customizable parameters to increase portability and secure sensitive information such as IP addresses.
impact: Improves code portability, security and ease of testing by preventing hardcoded URIs. It can also help in avoiding the storage of sensitive information in the code.

checks.message: Replace hardcoded URIs with customizable parameters to increase portability and secure sensitive information such as IP addresses.
